tasks.title: Connect strategy framework to live Kalshi market data
tasks.description: Wire bob's strategy_runner.js to pull real market prices from the Kalshi API client (task 219 output). Run mean_reversion and momentum strategies against at least 3 live markets. Output: trade_signals.json with entry/exit recommendations.
